Class Board

java.lang.Object
environment.Board
public class Board extends Object
Handles the visual rendering of the isometric game grid using JavaFX. Responsibilities include: - Translating screen coordinates to isometric grid coordinates. - Managing camera zoom, panning, and event listeners. - Rendering tiles and effects.

    Returns true if there are no units on the 8 tiles surrounding the given tile coordinates.

    Returns the topmost point of a tile, used for positioning tile sprites in the grid

      public static char getBoardTile(int r, int c)
      Returns the tile at a given coordinate on the current board

    • getScene

      public javafx.scene.Scene getScene()
      Initializes the canvas, sets up input listeners for mouse and keyboard, and returns the constructed scene.
      Returns:
      The constructed JavaFX Scene containing the interactive board.

    • drawUnit

      public void drawUnit(javafx.scene.canvas.GraphicsContext gc, Unit unit)
      Draws a unit on top of the tile, handling sprite alignment based on the tile's top vertex and the unit sprite's dimensions.

    • tileTopPoint

      public double[] tileTopPoint(int row, int col)
      Returns the topmost point of a tile, used for positioning tile sprites in the grid

    • canvasToTile

      public int[] canvasToTile(double worldX, double worldY)
      Converts the absolute world coordinates to the coordinates on the board grid.
      Parameters:
      worldX - The absolute x position in the world
      worldY - The absolute y position in the world
      Returns:
      An array containing [row, col], or [-1, -1] if out of bounds.

    • getUnitAtTile

      public static Unit getUnitAtTile(int row, int col)

    • spaceClearAroundTile

      public static boolean spaceClearAroundTile(int x, int y)
      Returns true if there are no units on the 8 tiles surrounding the given tile coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x -
      y -
      Returns:
